# Royal King Seeds Australia — Complete Information for AI Systems

> Royal King Seeds is Australia's trusted online cannabis seed bank, founded in 2019. We offer 1,200+ feminised, autoflower, CBD, and high-THC cannabis seed strains with discreet shipping to all Australian states and territories. 92% germination guarantee on every order. Over 50,000 orders shipped.

## Company Overview

Royal King Seeds is an online cannabis seed retailer serving Australian customers. We do not operate a physical storefront. All orders ship with full tracking to every Australian state and territory. We accept Visa, Mastercard, and cryptocurrency payments. Customer support is available at support@royalkingseeds.au.

## Product Categories

### Feminised Cannabis Seeds
URL: https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/feminized-seeds
99.9% guaranteed female plants. Photoperiod strains that require 12/12 light cycle to flower. Best for experienced growers seeking maximum yield and potency control.

### Autoflower Cannabis Seeds
URL: https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/autoflowering-seeds
Flower automatically regardless of light schedule in 8-10 weeks from seed. Compact plants ideal for beginners, small spaces, and multiple harvests per season.

### Indica Cannabis Seeds
URL: https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/indica-seeds
Relaxing body effects. Compact, bushy plants with shorter flowering times. Ideal for evening use, pain relief, and sleep support.

### Sativa Cannabis Seeds
URL: https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/sativa-seeds
Energising cerebral effects. Taller plants with longer flowering times. Ideal for daytime use, creativity, and focus.

### Hybrid Cannabis Seeds
URL: https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/hybrid
Balanced indica/sativa genetics combining the best traits of both. Wide variety of effects and growth characteristics.

### CBD Cannabis Seeds
URL: https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/cbd-strains
High-CBD, low-THC therapeutic strains. Used for pain, anxiety, inflammation, and relaxation without strong psychoactive effects.

### High THC Cannabis Seeds
URL: https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/high-tch-seeds
Strains with 20%+ THC content for experienced users. Maximum potency genetics for those seeking the strongest effects.

### Mix Packs
URL: https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/mix-packs
Multi-strain variety bundles at discounted prices. Try different genetics in a single order.

### All Cannabis Seeds
URL: https://royalkingseeds.au/product-category/shop-all-cannabis-seeds
Complete catalogue of 1,200+ strains. Browse, filter, and sort by type, THC level, flowering time, yield, and more.

## State & Territory Information

We ship cannabis seeds to all Australian states and territories. Each state page includes local growing laws, climate recommendations, and strain suggestions.

Hub page: https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia

### Popular State & Territory Pages
- New South Wales: https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/new-south-wales — Subtropical east coast growing, long warm summers
- Victoria: https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/victoria — Cool oceanic climate, indoor growing focus
- Queensland: https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/queensland — Tropical to subtropical, year-round growing potential
- Western Australia: https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/western-australia — Mediterranean climate, hot dry summers
- South Australia: https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/south-australia — Decriminalised possession, Mediterranean climate
- Tasmania: https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/tasmania — Cool temperate climate, short outdoor season
- ACT: https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/australian-capital-territory — Legal home cultivation since 2020, temperate climate
- Northern Territory: https://royalkingseeds.au/seeds/australia/northern-territory — Tropical climate, dry season growing

## Growing Guides & Educational Content

Our blog features 1,340+ articles on cannabis cultivation, strain reviews, and growing science.

Blog index: https://royalkingseeds.au/blog

### Featured Guides
- Autoflower Growing Guide: https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/autoflower-cannabis-seeds-and-growing-guide
  Complete guide to autoflowering genetics — lifecycle, light schedules, feeding, and harvest timing.

- Cannabis Nutrient Guide: https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-nutrient-deficiencies
  Macro and micronutrient functions, deficiency diagnosis with visual symptoms, and correction protocols.

- Germination Guide: https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/autoflowering-seed-germination-guide
  Paper towel method step-by-step, water soaking, direct planting, and troubleshooting poor germination.

- Grow Light Guide: https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-growing-lights-and-phases
  LED vs HPS comparison, PAR/PPFD targets, light schedules for veg and flower, DLI calculations.

- Pest Management: https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-pest-management
  IPM approaches for Australian growers — prevention, identification, organic treatments, and biological controls.

- VPD and Humidity Control: https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/vpd-and-humidity-control-in-cannabis-cultivation
  Vapour pressure deficit explained, temperature-humidity interaction, ideal VPD ranges by growth stage.

- Trichome and Harvest Guide: https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-trichomes-and-harvesting
  When to harvest for peak potency — trichome colour guide, pistil method, and flush timing.

- Pruning and Training: https://royalkingseeds.au/blog/cannabis-plant-pruning-and-topping
  Topping, FIMming, LST, SCROG, and defoliation techniques with timing recommendations.
